NCT02483585.label: Outcome
NCT02483585.source: Cephalalgia : an international journal of headache
NCT02483585.text: A ≥ 50% reduction in monthly migraine days was achieved by 39.7% (erenumab) and 29.5% (placebo) of patients (OR:1.59 (95% CI: 1.12, 2.27) ( p = 0.010).

NCT02621931.text: 3; common odds ratio, 1.7; 95% CI, 1.0 to 2.8; P=0.04).
